title: correct stats err with non-running containers
body:
when doing stats -a|--all, if you have non-running containers, we should
not error on not being able to get information like PID, etc on them.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude The bot's probably nonfunctional since Github turned off webhooks to debug things
github status says it should be back on ...
